isolation.mutationBoundary: Only /tmp/codex-fleet-user-testing-cli-partial-gitops/* on shuvtest was mutated; timeoutbox was untouched.

steps.action: Advance origin on shuvtest via the isolated peer clone so repo becomes behind origin.
steps.expected: repo HEAD differs from origin HEAD before running fleet pull.
steps.observed: Before text run repo HEAD b973e197d596db0a5225af3d499973cb80318717 was behind origin HEAD 5b87f3a8862fdce58341721cfbccbe5ebca001e0.

steps.action: Run fleet pull against the mixed-host config.
steps.expected: Healthy host succeeds, timeout host fails, and the CLI reports partial success.
steps.observed: `fleet pull --config /tmp/codex-fleet-user-testing-cli/mixed-fleet.yaml --repo /tmp/codex-fleet-user-testing-cli-partial-gitops/repo` exited 2 in 1319.1 ms; stdout showed `shuvtest` as `[OK]`, `timeoutbox` as `[FAIL]`, and summary `1 succeeded, 1 failed`.

steps.action: Verify shuvtest repo state after the command.
steps.expected: The healthy host repository updates to origin despite the timeout host failure.
steps.observed: After the text run repo HEAD changed to 5b87f3a8862fdce58341721cfbccbe5ebca001e0 and matched origin HEAD 5b87f3a8862fdce58341721cfbccbe5ebca001e0.

steps.action: Advance origin again so the healthy repo has work to pull before the JSON run.
steps.expected: repo HEAD differs from origin HEAD before rerunning the CLI.
steps.observed: Before JSON run repo HEAD 5b87f3a8862fdce58341721cfbccbe5ebca001e0 was behind origin HEAD 98001fcdaba83bfbdcf24f785dcc1002f5112ace.

steps.action: Run fleet pull with --json using the mixed-host config.
steps.expected: CLI emits valid JSON describing both host outcomes and exits with the partial-success code.
steps.observed: `fleet pull --json --config /tmp/codex-fleet-user-testing-cli/mixed-fleet.yaml --repo /tmp/codex-fleet-user-testing-cli-partial-gitops/repo` exited 2 in 1321.8 ms and stdout parsed successfully as JSON with 2 host entries.

steps.action: Inspect JSON fields for each host result.
steps.expected: Each entry includes host/status details; failing host also includes an error.
steps.observed: JSON contained `shuvtest` => status `ok`, hostname `shuvtest`, updated `True` and `timeoutbox` => status `fail`, hostname `192.0.2.1`, error `Network timeout during git pull origin on 192.0.2.1`.

steps.action: Run the mixed-host pull while timeoutbox is configured with a 1s timeout.
steps.expected: The timeout host reports a timeout-related failure rather than blocking all processing.
steps.observed: Text run finished in 1319.1 ms and JSON run finished in 1321.8 ms; the failure output referenced timeout behavior (`Network timeout during git pull origin on 192.0.2.1`).

steps.action: Check that shuvtest still completes its pull during the same mixed run.
steps.expected: Healthy host repo advances even though timeoutbox fails.
steps.observed: Text run advanced shuvtest repo from b973e197d596db0a5225af3d499973cb80318717 to 5b87f3a8862fdce58341721cfbccbe5ebca001e0; JSON run advanced it again from 5b87f3a8862fdce58341721cfbccbe5ebca001e0 to 98001fcdaba83bfbdcf24f785dcc1002f5112ace.

steps.action: Confirm final remote state on the healthy host.
steps.expected: repo HEAD matches origin HEAD after each run and working tree remains clean.
steps.observed: After each run shuvtest repo HEAD matched origin (5b87f3a8862fdce58341721cfbccbe5ebca001e0 then 98001fcdaba83bfbdcf24f785dcc1002f5112ace) and `git status --short` remained empty.

frictions.description: `tuistory` was not installed in PATH, so terminal evidence was captured as raw stdout/stderr/exit metadata plus combined command transcripts in the assigned evidence directory.
frictions.resolution: Saved per-command terminal transcript files alongside raw stdout/stderr and metadata artifacts.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. Text pull and JSON pull both returned exit code 2 with shuvtest succeeding and timeoutbox timing out; shuvtest repo advanced from b973e197d596db0a5225af3d499973cb80318717 -> 5b87f3a8862fdce58341721cfbccbe5ebca001e0 -> 98001fcdaba83bfbdcf24f785dcc1002f5112ace.
